title: Acknowledge + empathy
body: I completely understand how frustrating this feels. I'm reviewing the logs now and will escalate to the right tier if timing starts to slip.

title: SLA timer update
body: You're still within our SLA window. I'm watching the countdown and will check back with the next update in roughly 15 minutes.

title: Plugin/Mod triage
body: Would you mind disabling the latest plugin temporarily and sending me the crash log so we can confirm whether it's a compatibility issue?

title: Billing clarity
body: Let me walk you through the invoice state and next steps. I can release the suspension once the automation cycle acknowledges the paid invoice.

title: Share KB article
body: This KB article covers the exact steps we've been talking about. I'm happy to take you through any part that needs more explanation.

title: Closure reminder
body: Before we close this ticket, I want to confirm that the follow-up plan and prevention steps are documented and that you're comfortable with the fix.
